The '''Noonian system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Noonar]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the system was under the rule of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trophan Thanis]] and was the site of several [[food processing center]]s of [[Nebula Consumables]]. Since Nebula Consumables supplied the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] attacked the shipping lanes and managed to steal 25% of all shipments, which caused Thanis to request reinforcements from the neighboring [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]].<ref name="AJ2" />
